messages.content: Hey, my kitchen sink is totally backed up and it smells horrible
Oh man, that's the worst. Okay, a backed-up sink... Is the water still, like, sitting in there, or is it draining super slow?
Yeah it's been like this since yesterday, I tried Drano but nothing worked

Ugh, Drano never really does the trick, does it? Okay, so that'd be a drain cleaning. Those usually run about one-fifty to three hundred, depends on how bad the clog is, you know? We could get someone out there today, if you want. What's your name?
Okay Sarah, nice to meet you. And what's your address? Just so I can see how soon we could get a plumber over there.
How much is this gonna run me?

Yeah, so drain cleaning usually runs about one-fifty to three hundred, depends on how bad the clog is. But that's just a general idea, you know? The plumber will give you the exact price before they start anything. We don't want any surprises.
Got it, Sarah. Thanks. Let me just confirm - you're at [ADDRESS OMITTED]?
When is the soonest someone could come out?

Let me see... Oh um... We've got someone finishing up a job in Brooklyn around 11:30, so they could head your way after that. Would sometime early afternoon work? I can't promise an exact time, but it would be sometime between, say, 12:30 and 2?
No worries, Sarah. We'll get that sink cleared out for you. So that would be sometime between 12:30 and 2pm then. Is there a buzzer or anything I should let the plumber know about?
